text.title: Subscription Models Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Subscription Models.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, three tiers, monthly + annual billing on Stripe.
example.trace: model = saas → tiers (Starter / Pro / Team gating on outcomes) → MRR + churn + LTV in Stripe dashboard → dunning 3 retries over 7 days → winback at +30/+60 days → grandfather 12 months
